CustomField.formula: IF( Lowest_Price__c > 0, Lowest_Price__c , Cost__c) + Accessories_other__c + Royalties__c + Other_Fee__c + Delivery_Form_Fee__c + Packaging_Fee__c + Color_Box_Fee__c + POS_Fee__c + Sales_of_Consumables_Fee__c + Other_Support__c + Cost__c * ( Accessories_other_Proportion__c + Sales_of_Consumables_Proportion__c + Commission_Proportion__c + Market_Fee_Proportion__c + After_sales_Fee_Proportion__c + Reserved_Proportion__c + Other_Support_Proportion__c )
CustomField.label: Unit Cost Price
